user_query:
Please generate my natal chart and compute transits using a local astrological calculator. Read input/birth_data.json for my birth details and input/targets.json for the target date. Then do the following:

1) Create a natal chart JSON at output/natal.json based on the birth details.
2) Produce a daily transit report for the target date and save the full text output to output/daily_2026-03-15.txt (use exactly that filename).
3) Produce a weekly forecast anchored on the week immediately following the target date and save to output/weekly_2026-03-15.txt.
4) Run a void-of-course Moon check and save the exact JSON output to output/voc.json.

Use only the given relative paths. The daily and weekly text files should include the calculator’s standard headers and sections.
